body.title: [triage] ticket_store: named query helpers — next/text/by_status/by_worker/by_gate/by_decision
body.description:
**Problem:** ticket_store.py is the filesystem queue chokepoint for reads/writes but exposes no named query surface — every caller reimplements the same inline list-comprehensions (filter by status, by worker, by gate, text search). That makes it impossible to build new skills on top without re-deriving the query. Akien's framing (2026-06-19): 'that lets us build new skills on top of that.'

**Proposed shape:** Add to unseen_university/ticket_store.py:
- `by_status(*statuses, include_closed=False)` → list[dict]: filter on body.status, priority-sorted
- `by_worker(name, include_closed=False)` → list[dict]: filter on body.worker
- `by_gate(gate_id)` → list[dict]: filter on body.gate (active only, for Granny)
- `by_decision(decision_id)` → list[dict]: filter on body.decision_id
- `text(query, limit=20, include_closed=True)` → list[dict]: term-presence match over id/title/description/tags (extract from search_tools._search_tickets which duplicates this logic)
- `next(worker=None)` → dict | None: by_status(sprint,ready,assigned) optionally filtered by worker, priority-sorted, first result — THIS IS THE CANONICAL IMPLEMENTATION; cmd_next in cc_queue.py must delegate to ts.next() after this ships (small follow-on in same PR or immediate follow)

Named in cognition terms (intent→structured-intent discipline): these are record-queries, not just ticket-filters — when Igor's cognition rides the same model the names survive without renaming.

**Affected files:**
- unseen_university/ticket_store.py (primary)
- tests/test_ticket_store.py (unit tests for each helper)
- devlab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (cmd_next delegation — small, ~5 lines)

**Design rules:** No Postgres anywhere. All reads are lock-free (atomic files). Single chokepoint — no caller reimplements these filters after this ships.

**Scope boundary:** ticket_store.py + tests + cmd_next delegation ONLY. Does NOT remove _search_tickets from search_tools.py — that belongs to T-ticket-tools-to-hubert (gated on this ticket).

**Test plan:**
- Unit: by_status(['sprint']) returns only sprint tickets; by_worker('DS.0') returns only DS.0's; text('granny') returns tickets with 'granny' in id/title/desc/tags; next() returns highest-priority sprint/ready ticket; by_gate/by_decision filter correctly
- Integration: cc_queue.py cmd_next result agrees with ts.next() on same store
- Regression: all existing ticket_store tests still green
